raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current work clarity","name":"What are your top three priorities this month, and why do they matter?","description":"Explores her understanding and alignment with current priorities.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy check-in","name":"How has your energy been over the past few weeks?","description":"Surfaces any ongoing issues with workload or stress.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Strategic impact","name":"Where do you see the biggest opportunity to increase your strategic impact?","description":"Probes areas where she can enhance her influence and contribution.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation challenges","name":"What's the most challenging part of delegation for you currently?","description":"Identifies obstacles in effective delegation and team empowerment.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Managing up","name":"How do you currently approach managing up with the director?","description":"Explores her strategies and challenges in managing upper management relationships.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Judgment confidence","name":"In which areas do you feel most confident making decisions?","description":"Identifies areas of strength in decision-making and potential growth.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team empowerment","name":"How do you empower your team to take more initiative in their roles?","description":"Examines her effectiveness in fostering team independence and initiative.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future challenges","name":"What challenges do you anticipate in your growth journey over the next year?","description":"Surfaces potential obstacles and areas for development in her growth path.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stress factors","name":"What's currently causing you the most stress, and is it within your control?","description":"Identifies sources of stress and her ability to manage them.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Vision alignment","name":"How aligned do you feel with the company's vision and goals right now?","description":"Assesses her sense of alignment and engagement with the broader company direction.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]}]}
